notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.4. It addresses 9 CVEs: CVE-2023-52840, CVE-2023-52756, CVE-2023-52762, CVE-2023-52784, CVE-2023-52803, and 4 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
